gameQueue.title: Saddlebag
gameQueue.concept: Spatial packing puzzle. Each round presents a set of irregularly-shaped gear items (L, T, I, S shapes) that must be fitted into a saddlebag grid. Tap to select an item, tap to rotate, tap a grid cell to place. Items have gold values -- maximize value in the bag before the departure timer runs out. 5 rounds with increasingly complex items and tighter grids.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First spatial rotation-and-placement mechanic in series (Tetromino-style packing), first inventory spatial reasoning challenge, first departure timer adding urgency to a placement puzzle

gameQueue.title: Drought Rider
gameQueue.concept: Narrative weather survival. A lone rider must cross a 7-day drought. Each day presents a survival decision (push through heat / find shade / trade canteen / flag a wagon) with outcome probabilities that shift based on prior choices and accumulated water/horse health. Hidden state tracks heat exposure compounding risk. First branching narrative with hidden accumulating state in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First purely narrative-driven survival game (no reflex or spatial mechanic -- only decisions), first hidden compounding state variable across multi-day arc, first risk-probability display for player decisions

gameQueue.title: Night Herd
gameQueue.concept: Isometric stealth defense. A mountain lion creeps toward a resting cattle herd at night. Player places firebrands (light sources) to divert its path -- the lion pathfinds around light using BFS cost weighting but returns once a firebrand burns out. Place a firebrand too close to cattle and they scatter, costing score. 5 escalating rounds with multiple predators and shorter burn timers.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First isometric perspective in series, first dynamic-light AI pathfinding (predator BFS cost scales with proximity to active firebrands), first dual-threat placement puzzle (light repels predator but also scatters cattle if placed within scatter radius)

runLog.summary: Built Game 57: Canyon Run - pseudo-3D perspective runner, vanishing-point obstacle approach, 3 obstacle types, 65 tests pass.
Built Game 56: Dead Eye - wind-drift shooting gallery, spring-follow crosshair, 3 target types, 58 tests pass.
Added 2s rival grace period at game start (roundStartTimer). Player can orient before rivals engage. 67 tests pass.
Built Game 43: Wanted: Reward - visual search + composite matching, 4-trait crowd silhouettes, economic payout, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 44: Trail Blaze - player-drawn pathfinding, 5 terrain types, A* comparison, escalating threats, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 45: Rattlesnake Round-Up - multi-phase hold+drag snake wrangling, thermal scope view, 3 snake tiers, 24 tests pass.
Built Game 46: Prairie Telegraph - semaphore relay chain, 26-letter visual alphabet, hex direct-selector UI, wind gusts, 25 tests pass.
Built Game 47: Outlaw Auction - hidden-value bounty bidding, 5 behavioral AI rivals, bankroll management, 36 tests pass.
Built Game 48: Hangman's Bluff - interrogation deception, lie memory, 3-stage sheriff checkpoint, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 49: Lariat Spin - rotational rope physics, momentum-accumulation + precision-release, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 50: Tin Pan Alley - melody-completion piano puzzle, musical phrase-memory mechanic, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 51: Pinkerton Trail - stealth pursuit tailing, suspicion meter, evidence collection, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 52: Frontier Forge - blacksmith 3-phase crafting (heat/strike/quench), material state simulation, 63 tests pass.
Built Game 53: Dust Bowl Derby - top-down vehicular demolition derby, dual-resource engine heat + body damage, 66 tests pass.
Built Game 54: Smoke Signal - timed smoke pattern generation, hold-duration mechanic, 68 tests pass.
Built Game 55: Cattle Baron - turn-based territory strategy, 4x4 parcel grid, 8 threat types, 78 tests pass.
